"'''Hunger Pains'''" was a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] appearing in ''[[Star Wars Tales 20]]'' about [[One-Arm]] and her children. Contrary to established [[Star Wars Legends]] lore, One-Arm is presented as male.

==Plot summary==
In 3 ABY, just before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], a [[One-Arm|wampa's]] children say they are starving, and he explains that ever since [[Human/Legends|humans]] arrived, the [[Wampa/Legends|wampas]]' preferred food of [[Tauntaun/Legends|Tauntauns]] has been in short supply due to domestication. Seeking to satisfy his children's hunger, the wampa begins a hopeless search for Tauntauns, but stumbles upon [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], mounted on one.

After hanging him upside down, in a fit of hunger, the wampa eats the whole Tauntaun, and decides to give Skywalker to his children instead. However, Skywalker uses his [[Anakin Skywalker's second lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to cut off the wampa's right arm and escapes, establishing the wampa as One-Arm. In the end, he gives his lost arm to his children, without telling them that it is not Tauntaun meat - or that it is in fact his own arm.
